name: HTTP Action Bot
description: Triggers safe REST API requests from WhatsApp commands and renders JSON responses back to chat.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis <yudhi@rmyndharis.com>

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: Origin API HTTPS, mis. https://erp.example.com. Host-nya auto-added ke allowlist outbound (allowConfigHosts). Wajib non-empty — tanpa ini setiap fetch diam-diam di-gate jadi no-op.

authToken.title: Token / API key
authToken.description: Bearer token atau API key (sesuai authType). Dimasking ***.

actions.title: Actions (JSON array)
actions.description: Array action sebagai JSON string. Contoh: [{"id":"check-order","match":{"type":"prefix","value":"cek-order "},"request":{"method":"GET","path":"/orders/{{args.0}}"},"replyTemplate":"Pesanan {{response.orderId}}: {{response.status}}"}]. Di-parse di config.ts.
